## Install

From source:

```sh
git clone <repo-url>
cd profilex
./scripts/install_from_source.sh
```

From a release archive:

```sh
./scripts/install_from_package.sh <artifact.tar.gz>
```

## Verification

- `ctest --test-dir .build --output-on-failure`
- `./scripts/clean_release_validate.sh`
